'''''Mon Adapyne''''' was an [[MC80B Star Cruiser]] that saw service with the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==History==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], ''Mon Adapyne'' served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] The vessel participated in many battles, including the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]], the [[Battle of Ebaq]], and the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
